Gingivectomies involve removal of hyperplastic or inflamed gingival tissue, which can help improve esthetics but does not address bone loss directly. Options B and C do not align with what a typical gingivectomy achieves; option D is more about wound healing than treatment goals for periodontal disease. My Answer: D To clarify further:
